Viking.text:
Wind
In west, northwesterly 6 to gale 8, decreasing 4 to 6. In east, cyclonic 2 to 4, occasionally 5.
Sea state
In west, very rough becoming rough, then moderate later. in east, moderate or rough, occasionally very rough at first.
Weather
In west, occasional rain. In east, showers.
Visibility
In west, moderate or poor. In east, moderate or good.
